# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'echo "Running default build step..."; # Example: mvn clean install', description: 'Shell commands to execute for the build phase.')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'echo "Running default test step..."; # Example: mvn test', description: 'Shell commands to execute for the testing phase.')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS', defaultValue: 'echo "Running default deployment step..."; # Example: docker push myrepo/myimage:latest', description: 'Shell commands to execute for the deployment phase.')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_COMMANDS) {
                        echo "Executing custom build commands:"
                        sh script: params.BUILD_COMMANDS
                    } else {
                        echo "No build commands provided. Skipping build step."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.TEST_COMMANDS) {
                        echo "Executing custom test scripts:"
                        sh script: params.TEST_COMMANDS
                    } else {
                        echo "No test commands provided. Skipping test step."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS) {
                        echo "Executing custom deployment steps:"
                        sh script: params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS
                    } else {
                        echo "No deployment commands provided. Skipping deployment step."
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo 'Pipeline finished.'
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline completed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed!'
        }
    }
}
